subcodes.first_line: O thou who hast believed in God and been rightly guided! The light of guidance hath dawned from the daybreak of eternity. Glorified be my Lord, the Most Exalted [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من آمن بالله و اهتدی قد اشرق من فجر البقاء نور الهدی فسبحان ربی الاعلی قد
subcodes.subjects: @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @spiritual transformation, @knowledge; recognition of God, @two kinds of knowledge [ilm and irfan]; sight and insight, @exhortations and counsels
